# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Bash script for deploying to AWS using the AWS CLI. The script should authenticate with AWS and perform deployment operations. Ensure the script can be used safely in both local development and CI/CD environments.

Prevent hardcoded secrets.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

#!/usr/bin/env bash

set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
LOG_FILE="${LOG_FILE:-/tmp/aws-deploy-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).log}"
AWS_REGION="${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1}"
ENVIRONMENT="${ENVIRONMENT:-development}"
DRY_RUN="${DRY_RUN:-false}"

log() {
    local level="$1"
    shift
    local message="$*"
    local timestamp=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
    echo "[${timestamp}] [${level}] ${message}" | tee -a "${LOG_FILE}"
}

error_exit() {
    log "ERROR" "$1"
    exit 1
}

check_dependencies() {
    local deps=("aws" "jq")
    for dep in "${deps[@]}"; do
        if ! command -v "${dep}" &> /dev/null; then
            error_exit "Required dependency '${dep}' not found. Please install it."
        fi
    done
}

load_config() {
    local config_file="${1:-}"
    
    if [[ -z "${config_file}" ]]; then
        config_file="${SCRIPT_DIR}/deploy-config.json"
    fi
    
    if [[ ! -f "${config_file}" ]]; then
        error_exit "Configuration file not found: ${config_file}"
    fi
    
    log "INFO" "Loading configuration from: ${config_file}"
    
    export APP_NAME=$(jq -r '.app_name // "myapp"' "${config_file}")
    export S3_BUCKET=$(jq -r '.s3_bucket // ""' "${config_file}")
    export CLOUDFORMATION_STACK=$(jq -r '.cloudformation_stack // ""' "${config_file}")
    export ECR_REPOSITORY=$(jq -r '.ecr_repository // ""' "${config_file}")
    export ECS_CLUSTER=$(jq -r '.ecs_cluster // ""' "${config_file}")
    export ECS_SERVICE=$(jq -r '.ecs_service // ""' "${config_file}")
    export LAMBDA_FUNCTION=$(jq -r '.lambda_function // ""' "${config_file}")
}

authenticate_aws() {
    log "INFO" "Authenticating with AWS..."
    
    if [[ -n "${AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID:-}" && -n "${AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY:-}" ]]; then
        log "INFO" "Using AWS credentials from environment variables"
    elif [[ -n "${AWS_PROFILE:-}" ]]; then
        log "INFO" "Using AWS profile: ${AWS_PROFILE}"
        export AWS_DEFAULT_PROFILE="${AWS_PROFILE}"
    elif [[ -f "${HOME}/.aws/credentials" ]]; then
        log "INFO" "Using AWS credentials from ~/.aws/credentials"
    else
        if command -v aws-vault &> /dev/null; then
            log "INFO" "Attempting to use aws-vault for authentication"
            if [[ -z "${AWS_VAULT:-}" ]]; then
                error_exit "AWS_VAULT environment variable not set. Run with: aws-vault exec <profile> -- $0"
            fi
        else
            error_exit "No AWS credentials found. Set AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID/AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, AWS_PROFILE, or configure ~/.aws/credentials"
        fi
    fi
    
    if ! aws sts get-caller-identity --region "${AWS_REGION}" &> /dev/null; then
        error_exit "AWS authentication failed. Please check your credentials."
    fi
    
    local caller_identity=$(aws sts get-caller-identity --region "${AWS_REGION}" --output json)
    local account_id=$(echo "${caller_identity}" | jq -r '.Account')
    local user_arn=$(echo "${caller_identity}" | jq -r '.Arn')
    
    log "INFO" "Successfully authenticated as: ${user_arn}"
    log "INFO" "AWS Account ID: ${account_id}"
    log "INFO" "AWS Region: ${AWS_REGION}"
    
    export AWS_ACCOUNT_ID="${account_id}"
}

validate_environment() {
    local valid_envs=("development" "staging" "production")
    local is_valid=false
    
    for env in "${valid_envs[@]}"; do
        if [[ "${ENVIRONMENT}" == "${env}" ]]; then
            is_valid=true
            break
        fi
    done
    
    if [[ "${is_valid}" == "false" ]]; then
        error_exit "Invalid environment: ${ENVIRONMENT}. Must be one of: ${valid_envs[*]}"
    fi
    
    log "INFO" "Deploying to environment: ${ENVIRONMENT}"
}

deploy_s3_static_site() {
    if [[ -z "${S3_BUCKET}" ]]; then
        log "WARN" "S3_BUCKET not configured, skipping S3 deployment"
        return 0
    fi
    
    local source_dir="${1:-./build}"
    
    if [[ ! -d "${source_dir}" ]]; then
        error_exit "Source directory not found: ${source_dir}"
    fi
    
    log "INFO" "Deploying static site to S3 bucket: ${S3_BUCKET}"
    
    if [[ "${DRY_RUN}" == "true" ]]; then
        log "INFO" "DRY RUN: Would sync ${source_dir} to s3://${S3_BUCKET}"
        return 0
    fi
    
    aws s3 sync "${source_dir}" "s3://${S3_BUCKET}" \
        --region "${AWS_REGION}" \
        --delete \
        --cache-control "max-age=31536000,public" \
        --exclude "*.html" \
        2>&1 | tee -a "${LOG_FILE}"
    
    aws s3 sync "${source_dir}" "s3://${S3_BUCKET}" \
        --region "${AWS_REGION}" \
        --exclude "*" \
        --include "*.html" \
        --cache-control "max-age=0,no-cache,no-store,must-revalidate" \
        2>&1 | tee -a "${LOG_FILE}"
    
    log "INFO" "S3 deployment completed successfully"
}

deploy_cloudformation() {
    if [[ -z "${CLOUDFORMATION_STACK}" ]]; then
        log "WARN" "CLOUDFORMATION_STACK not configured, skipping CloudFormation deployment"
        return 0
    fi
    
    local template_file="${1:-./cloudformation/template.yaml}"
    local parameters_file="${2:-./cloudformation/parameters-${ENVIRONMENT}.json}"
    
    if [[ ! -f "${template_file}" ]]; then
        error_exit "CloudFormation template not found: ${template_file}"
    fi
    
    log "INFO" "Deploying CloudFormation stack: ${CLOUDFORMATION_STACK}"
    
    local params_arg=""
    if [[ -f "${parameters_file}" ]]; then
        params_arg="--parameter-overrides file://${parameters_file}"
    fi
    
    if [[ "${DRY_RUN}" == "true" ]]; then
        log "INFO" "DRY RUN: Would deploy CloudFormation stack ${CLOUDFORMATION_STACK}"
        return 0
    fi
    
    aws cloudformation deploy \
        --template-file "${template_file}" \
        --stack-name "${CLOUDFORMATION_STACK}" \
        --region "${AWS_REGION}" \
        --capabilities CAPABILITY_IAM CAPABILITY_NAMED_IAM \
        ${params_arg} \
        --no-fail-on-empty-changeset \
        2>&1 | tee -a "${LOG_FILE}"
    
    log "INFO" "CloudFormation deployment completed successfully"
}

deploy_docker_to_ecr() {
    if [[ -z "${ECR_REPOSITORY}" ]]; then
        log "WARN" "ECR_REPOSITORY not configured, skipping ECR deployment"
        return 0
    fi
    
    local dockerfile="${1:-./Dockerfile}"
    local image_tag="${2:-${ENVIRONMENT}-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)}"
    
    if [[ ! -f "${dockerfile}" ]]; then
        error_exit "Dockerfile not found: ${dockerfile}"
    fi
    
    log "INFO" "Building and pushing Docker image to ECR: ${ECR_REPOSITORY}"
    
    local ecr_uri="${AWS_ACCOUNT_ID}.dkr.ecr.${AWS_REGION}.amazonaws.com/${ECR_REPOSITORY}"
    
    if [[ "${DRY_RUN}" == "true" ]]; then
        log "INFO" "DRY RUN: Would build and push Docker image to ${ecr_uri}:${image_tag}"
        return 0
    fi
    
    log "INFO" "Logging in to ECR..."
    aws ecr get-login-password --region "${AWS_REGION}" | \
        docker login --username AWS --password-stdin "${AWS_ACCOUNT_ID}.dkr.ecr.${AWS_REGION}.amazonaws.com" \
        2>&1 | tee -a "${LOG_FILE}"
    
    log "INFO" "Building Docker image..."
    docker build -t "${ECR_REPOSITORY}:${image_tag}" -f "${dockerfile}" . \
        2>&1 | tee -a "${LOG_FILE}"
    
    docker tag "${ECR_REPOSITORY}:${image_tag}" "${ecr_uri}:${image_tag}"
    docker tag "${ECR_REPOSITORY}:${image_tag}" "${ecr_uri}:latest"
    
    log "INFO" "Pushing Docker image to ECR..."
    docker push "${ecr_uri}:${image_tag}" 2>&1 | tee -a "${LOG_FILE}"
    docker push "${ecr_uri}:latest" 2>&1 | tee -a "${LOG_FILE}"
    
    log "INFO" "Docker image pushed successfully: ${ecr_uri}:${image_tag}"
    
    export DOCKER_IMAGE_URI="${ecr_uri}:${image_tag}"
}

deploy_ecs_service() {
    if [[ -z "${ECS_CLUSTER}" || -z "${ECS_SERVICE}" ]]; then
        log "WARN" "ECS_CLUSTER or ECS_SERVICE not configured, skipping ECS deployment"
        return 0
    fi
    
    log "INFO" "Updating ECS service: ${ECS_SERVICE} in cluster: ${ECS_CLUSTER}"
    
    if [[ "${DRY_RUN}" == "true" ]]; then
        log "INFO" "DRY RUN: Would update ECS service ${ECS_SERVICE}"
        return 0
    fi
    
    aws ecs update-service \
        --cluster "${ECS_CLUSTER}" \
        --service "${ECS_SERVICE}" \
        --force-new-deployment \
        --region "${AWS_REGION}" \
        2>&1 | tee -a "${LOG_FILE}"
    
    log "INFO" "Waiting for ECS service to stabilize..."
    aws ecs wait services-stable \
        --cluster "${ECS_CLUSTER}" \
        --services "${ECS_SERVICE}" \
        --region "${AWS_REGION}" \
        2>&1 | tee -a "${LOG_FILE}"
    
    log "INFO" "ECS service deployment completed successfully"
}

deploy_lambda_function() {
    if [[ -z "${LAMBDA_FUNCTION}" ]]; then
        log "WARN" "LAMBDA_FUNCTION not configured, skipping Lambda deployment"
        return 0
    fi
    
    local deployment_package="${1:-./lambda-deployment.zip}"
    
    if [[ ! -f "${deployment_package}" ]]; then
        error_exit "Lambda deployment package not found: ${deployment_package}"
    fi
    
    log "INFO" "Deploying Lambda function: ${LAMBDA_FUNCTION}"
    
    if [[ "${DRY_RUN}" == "true" ]]; then
        log "INFO" "DRY RUN: Would deploy Lambda function ${LAMBDA_FUNCTION}"
        return 0
    fi
    
    aws lambda update-function-code \
        --function-name "${LAMBDA_FUNCTION}" \
        --zip-file "fileb://${deployment_package}" \
        --region "${AWS_REGION}" \
        2>&1 | tee -a "${LOG_FILE}"
    
    log "INFO" "Waiting for Lambda function to be updated..."
    aws lambda wait function-updated \
        --function-name "${LAMBDA_FUNCTION}" \
        --region "${AWS_REGION}" \
        2>&1 | tee -a "${LOG_FILE}"
    
    log "INFO" "Lambda function deployment completed successfully"
}

invalidate_cloudfront() {
    local distribution_id="${1:-}"
    
    if [[ -z "${distribution_id}" ]]; then
        log "WARN" "CloudFront distribution ID not provided, skipping invalidation"
        return 0
    fi
    
    log "INFO" "Creating CloudFront invalidation for distribution: ${distribution_id}"
    
    if [[ "${DRY_RUN}" == "true" ]]; then
        log "INFO" "DRY RUN: Would invalidate CloudFront distribution ${distribution_id}"
        return 0
    fi
    
    local invalidation_id=$(aws cloudfront create-invalidation \
        --distribution-id "${distribution_id}" \
        --paths "/*" \
        --query 'Invalidation.Id' \
        --output text \
        2>&1 | tee -a "${LOG_FILE}")
    
    log "INFO" "CloudFront invalidation created: ${invalidation_id}"
}

rollback_deployment() {
    log "WARN" "Initiating rollback..."
    
    if [[ -n "${ECS_CLUSTER}" && -n "${ECS_SERVICE}" ]]; then
        log "INFO" "Rolling back ECS service..."
        aws ecs update-service \
            --cluster "${ECS_CLUSTER}" \
            --service "${ECS_SERVICE}" \
            --force-new-deployment \
            --region "${AWS_REGION}" \
            2>&1 | tee -a "${LOG_FILE}" || true
    fi
    
    log "WARN" "Rollback completed. Please verify the state of your deployment."
}

cleanup() {
    local exit_code=$?
    
    if [[ ${exit_code} -ne 0 ]]; then
        log "ERROR" "Deployment failed with exit code: ${exit_code}"
        if [[ "${ENVIRONMENT}" == "production" ]]; then
            read -p "Do you want to rollback? (yes/no): " -r
            if [[ $REPLY =~ ^[Yy]es$ ]]; then
                rollback_deployment
            fi
        fi
    else
        log "INFO" "Deployment completed successfully"
    fi
    
    log "INFO" "Log file saved to: ${LOG_FILE}"
}

trap cleanup EXIT

usage() {
    cat << EOF
Usage: $0 [OPTIONS]

AWS Deployment Script

OPTIONS:
    -c, --config FILE          Configuration file (default: ./deploy-config.json)
    -e, --environment ENV      Environment (development|staging|production)
    -r, --region REGION        AWS region (default: us-east-1)
    -t, --type TYPE            Deployment type (s3|cloudformation|ecs|lambda|all)
    -d, --dry-run              Perform a dry run without making changes
    -h, --help                 Show this help message

ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES:
    AWS_REGION                 AWS region
    AWS_PROFILE                AWS profile name
    AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID          AWS access key (not recommended for production)
    AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY      AWS secret key (not recommended for production)
    ENVIRONMENT                Deployment environment
    DRY_RUN                    Enable dry run mode (true|false)

EXAMPLES:
    $0 --config ./config.json --environment production --type all
    $0 -e staging -t ecs
    AWS_PROFILE=myprofile $0 -e production -t s3

EOF
    exit 0
}

main() {
    local config_file=""
    local deployment_type="all"
    
    while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
        case $1 in
            -c|--config)
                config_file="$2"
                shift 2
                ;;
            -e|--environment)
                ENVIRONMENT="$2"
                shift 2
                ;;
            -r|--region)
                AWS_REGION="$2"
                shift 2
                ;;
            -t|--type)
                deployment_type="$2"
                shift 2
                ;;
            -d|--dry-run)
                DRY_RUN="true"
                shift
                ;;
            -h|--help)
                usage
                ;;
            *)
                error_exit "Unknown option: $1"
                ;;
        esac
    done
    
    log "INFO" "Starting AWS deployment script..."
    log "INFO" "Dry run mode: ${DRY_RUN}"
    
    check_dependencies
    load_config "${config_file}"
    validate_environment
    authenticate_aws
    
    case "${deployment_type}" in
        s3)
            deploy_s3_static_site
            ;;
        cloudformation)
            deploy_cloudformation
            ;;
        ecs)
            deploy_docker_to_ecr
            deploy_ecs_service
            ;;
        lambda)
            deploy_lambda_function
            ;;
        all)
            deploy_cloudformation
            deploy_s3_static_site
            deploy_docker_to_ecr
            deploy_ecs_service
            deploy_lambda_function
            ;;
        *)
            error_exit "Invalid deployment type: ${deployment_type}"
            ;;
    esac
    
    log "INFO" "All deployment operations completed successfully"
}

main "$@"
